name: What ever you want simulator
description:
Trying to set up a free range simulator. Trying to set up a sand box where user can pick there own world or has simulator generated randomly to start a journey. The main feature is I add vivid descriptive narrative in style of novel as prompt so hopefully it gave engaging interaction no matter what scene you choose.

The simulator default use third person and will not use 1st person "I " for user. If it does usually you can correct by "I used 'I' for [character name] you do not use I for [same character name]

But if it happens often it breaks immersive experience. Let me know in feedback if simulator confuses it's role often. I will try to tweak it.

I instructed simulator the generate relevant new characters as needed or as instructed by user to create a stimulating plot. So it might had character come up in classic tropes like bump in to user when user is in a rush. Or someone start a conversation in a bar etc at least that's the goal so there is more points of interaction. Let me know if it stay idle (no one show up or nothing happens story doesn't move forward unless instructed) or it gets too crazy or annoying (I don't know, like someone jump in your bathroom stall when uncalled for😅"

Again this is a very rough bot. It just seems there is not a lot of bot here for creating your own world and have interaction by random chance so I want to give it a try. I like this still because it use users creativity and preferences while the AI help to give element of suprise and catalyst for proceeding story. In a way bot in this case is a medium to expand from users imagination. Feel free to give feedback but please be respectful.

A more specific simulator would be like a world of medieval fantasy, a world of Future dystopian. Considering this more like a very crude framework for those more refined simulators.
creator: PupCoomax
